name: Backrooms: Last Room - Infinite Depths
short_description: Experience the unknown world of utility rooms through a VHS camera, you will have to feel all the fear and anxiety of loneliness, plunging deeper and deeper into the world of utility rooms behind the scenes In search of that very, cherished, last room
detailed_description:
Backrooms: Last Room is a game with a serious plot and rare graphics. You are invited to dive into the utility rooms using a VHS camera. You may need a little luck to complete this whole journey in one piece) Be careful, because there may be dangerous creatures on the way
You have a flashlight in your inventory, you can use it in dark places, there are ready-made locations, you can read more about them in the early access tab
You were in the store before you got into the Backrooms, strange incomprehensible music sounded, after which you had to visit the back rooms, do not forget that there are people from the portal who are ready to save you



-The game does not provide for saving yet, we will add this a little later, as well as multiplayer via steam
